extraction_result.cfp_subject: Announcement of Opportunity for Interdisciplinary Scientists (IDS) and Guest Investigators (GIs) for the BepiColombo mission, a joint ESA-JAXA project with NASA participation. This AO seeks to appoint up to one IDS from ESA Member States and up to eleven GIs from ESA Member States, Japan, and the USA, for a three-year renewable term, to enhance the scientific return of the Mercury mission. Appointments are ad personam, and selected individuals are responsible for securing their own funding.

content.title: Announcement of Opportunity for an Interdisciplinary Scientist and Guest Investigators in the BepiColombo mission - Title only
subtitles: Interdisciplinary Scientist (IDS) Positions Available: Up to one IDS from ESA Member States
Guest Investigator (GI) Positions Available: Up to eleven GIs (up to five from ESA Member States, up to one from Japan, up to five from the USA)
Funding Responsibility: Proposers responsible for securing own funding; ESA will not fund activities
Eligibility for IDS: Scientists based in ESA Member States
Eligibility for GIs: Scientists based in ESA Member States, Japan, and USA
Exclusion Criteria: Principal Investigators and Co-Principal Investigators of BepiColombo instrument teams
Eligibility for Co-Investigators: Eligible for IDS positions, but not for GI positions

content.title: Proposal Submission Requirements - Title only
subtitles: File Protection Status: Files must not be locked or protected

content.title: Schedule - Title only
subtitles: Announcement of Opportunity Release Date: 22 April 2025
Letters of Intent Due Date: 20 May 2025, 12:00 (noon) CEST

content.title: Contact - Title only
